name: SQL query
func:
msg.topic = "SELECT (SELECT distance_cm FROM fill_readings WHERE bin_id = 'checkbin_02' ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1) as distance, (SELECT recorded_at FROM activity_readings WHERE bin_id = 'checkbin_02' ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1) as last_activity, (SELECT temp_c FROM weather_history ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1) as temp, (SELECT humidity_pct FROM weather_history ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1) as humidity;";
return msg;

name: status controller
sql query
func:
msg.topic = `
SELECT 
    DATE(a.recorded_at) AS date_label,
    HOUR(a.recorded_at) AS hour_of_day,
    COUNT(a.id) AS activity_count,
    MAX(w.precipitation_mm) AS rain_mm,
    MAX(w.weather_code) AS weather_code
FROM activity_readings a
LEFT JOIN weather_history w 
    ON DATE(a.recorded_at) = DATE(w.timestamp) 
    AND HOUR(a.recorded_at) = HOUR(w.timestamp)
WHERE a.bin_id = 'checkbin_02'
GROUP BY date_label, hour_of_day
ORDER BY date_label, hour_of_day;
`
return msg;

name: activity freq controller
sql query
func:
msg.topic = `
SELECT 
    f.recorded_at AS time,
    f.distance_cm AS distance,
    (
        SELECT COUNT(*) 
        FROM activity_readings a 
        WHERE a.bin_id = f.bin_id 
        AND a.recorded_at > f.recorded_at - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE
        AND a.recorded_at <= f.recorded_at
    ) AS activity_count
FROM fill_readings f
WHERE f.bin_id = 'checkbin_02'
ORDER BY f.recorded_at ASC;
`
return msg;

name: overflow controller
sql query
func:
msg.topic = `
SELECT 
    w.timestamp AS hour_label,
    w.humidity_pct,
    w.precipitation_mm,
    (
        SELECT COUNT(*) 
        FROM activity_readings a 
        WHERE a.bin_id = 'checkbin_02' 
        AND a.recorded_at >= w.timestamp 
        AND a.recorded_at < w.timestamp + INTERVAL 1 HOUR
    ) AS activity_count
FROM weather_history w
WHERE w.timestamp >= (SELECT MIN(recorded_at) FROM activity_readings WHERE bin_id = 'checkbin_02')
ORDER BY w.timestamp ASC;
`
return msg;

name: humid x bin controller
sql query
func:
msg.topic = `
    -- 1. Sensor Stats: Count only valid 'Full' durations (12cm - 44.9cm)
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) as total_readings,
        SUM(CASE WHEN distance_cm >= 12 AND distance_cm < 45 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as full_readings
    FROM fill_readings 
    WHERE bin_id = 'checkbin_02';

    -- 2. Survey Stats: General perceptions
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) as total_users,
        SUM(CASE WHEN encountered_overflow = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as overflow_reports,
        AVG(CAST(cleanliness_satisfaction AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as avg_satisfaction
    FROM survey_responses;
`;
return msg;
